hook.summary: A woman laughs while playing a game, with text describing stealing a tulip from a friend's garden.
hook.visual_action: A woman in white pajamas sits on a bed, laughing and holding her phone.
hook.text_overlay: You see a rare tulip in your friendgarden and decideto steal it
hook.voiceover_transcript: Oh! She's stealing! She's... go get her! Go!

scene_flow: UGC shot of a woman laughing while playing the game on her phone.
Transition to a top-down view of a colorful digital garden and greenhouse.
End card showing the game title 'The Cozy Florist' and a 'Play Now' button.
on_screen_text: You see a rare tulip in your friendgarden and decideto steal it
audience_proxy: Casual female gamers who enjoy social simulation and garden decoration games.
